productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Magenta Top
description: Composition Magenta round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with fold-over hem, half buttoned placket, stitch detailing on the chest and ruched hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a covertly feminine appeal. Understated tops are the flavour of the moment and this top with its simplistic cut and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatility. Pair this with skinny jeans, a jacket and red closed toe pumps from catwalk. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
